mapper.select: /*ArsMapper.getAcenVocEndTrg*/ SELECT REQ_SEQ, STATUS FROM NMCP_ACEN_VOC_REQ WHERE DUE_DT < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND STATUS IN ('00', '01') ORDER BY REQ_SEQ
mapper.insert: /*ArsMapper.insertAcenVocHist*/ INSERT INTO NMCP_ACEN_VOC_HIST( REQ_SEQ ,SEQ ,VOC_AGNT_CD ,STATUS ,DUE_DT ,VOC_SUB_CTG_CD ,VOC_CONTENT ,ANS_CONTENT ,CALL_CONTENT ,REGST_ID ,REGST_DTTM ) SELECT REQ_SEQ ,NVL((SELECT MAX(SEQ) + 1 FROM NMCP_ACEN_VOC_HIST WHERE REQ_SEQ = #{reqSeq}), 1) ,VOC_AGNT_CD ,STATUS ,DUE_DT ,VOC_SUB_CTG_CD ,VOC_CONTENT ,ANS_CONTENT ,CALL_CONTENT ,RVISN_ID ,SYSDATE FROM NMCP_ACEN_VOC_REQ WHERE REQ_SEQ = #{reqSeq}
mapper.select: /*ArsMapper.getAcenVocInfo*/ SELECT REQ_SEQ ,VOC_SEQ ,CONTRACT_NUM ,VOC_AGNT_CD ,STATUS ,VOC_SUB_CTG_CD ,VOC_CONTENT ,DUE_DT ,ANS_CONTENT ,TO_CHAR(RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS RVISN_DTTM ,RVISN_ID FROM NMCP_ACEN_VOC_REQ WHERE REQ_SEQ = #{reqSeq}
